sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67911" key="mic2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μιξ-</orth>, compd. words so beginning shd. perh. be written <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειξ-</orth>; the evidence is indecisive; Inscrr. prove that <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μειξ</foreign>- is correct in pr. nn.</entryFree>
